description: Machine-readable publication guardrails for presenting fp-ineq runs as defensible fp-r results.
agent_rules: Every published fp-ineq run must map to a classified lane in the current fp-r matrix.
Legacy-split lanes may be published on the broader fp-ineq surface, but they must not control the default fp-r presentation contract.
Published legacy-split lanes must say so explicitly in the public label or summary surface.
Default-selected fp-r runs must be public_default_safe unless the publication contract is deliberately revised.
Do not treat raw fp.exe equality as the publication contract for lanes already classified as shared modern-vs-legacy splits.
